one_time_description: Government of Canada Drinking Water Settlement - $500,000 non-recurring settlement payment
economic_notes: Band operates Toosey Enterprises (gas bar and other businesses), Tell Tale Signs, Chilcotin Plateau Enterprises Ltd., Toosey Old School group of companies, and Cariboo Aboriginal Forestry Enterprises LP (50% interest). Tolko cutting rights revenue of $475,875. Natural Resource Canada funding of $353,461.
notes: Tl'esqox (formerly Toosey Indian Band) located in BC. Band business entities accounted for under modified equity method include Chilcotin Plateau Enterprises Ltd., Toosey Old School group of LPs and Corporations, and Cariboo Aboriginal Forestry Enterprises LP (50%). Toosey Enterprises revenue of $3.15M and Tell Tale Signs $195K included in consolidated results. Earnings from investment in Band business entities is negative ($-1,173,996) indicating net losses from equity-accounted entities in 2023. CMHC deferred revenue dropped significantly from $4,009,838 to $255,847 suggesting prior year CMHC funds were spent in 2023. Tangible capital assets increased substantially from $13M to $17.9M indicating significant capital investment year. No schedule of remuneration visible in provided pages.
